special_mechanics.name: Beat 'em Up Combat
special_mechanics.description: Side-scrolling beat-'em-up gameplay with unarmed combat mechanics. No weapons featured due to developer Arnold Schwarzenegger's content restrictions.

special_mechanics.name: Time Limit Stages
special_mechanics.description: SNES and Genesis versions feature strict time limits to defeat each level

tier_notes: Tier 3 - No specific movement physics parameters documented. Sources focus on game design, development history, and critical reception rather than technical physics data. Game characterized as a platformer/beat-em-up with no quantified movement mechanics in available documentation.
sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (Last Action Hero SNES article)
wikipedia - Last Action Hero (video game) article
